slo_compliance_pct.description: SLO compliance percentage for Tier-1 services

error_budget_remaining_pct.description: Remaining error budget percentage before policy triggers

cim_p1_count.description: P1 customer impacted incidents per period

mttr_critical_breaches.description: Count of Critical MTTR breaches (>2h) per period

mttr_high_breaches.description: Count of High MTTR breaches (>4h) per period

cfr_pct.description: Change failure rate — deployments causing degradation/rollback

pdr_pct.description: Proactive detection ratio — system detected vs total incidents

on_call_burden_ratio.description: Engineers in rotation : total SRE headcount (Google SRE benchmark 1:4)

toil_ratio_pct.description: Percentage of SRE work that is manual, repetitive, automatable

alert_snr_pct.description: Alert signal-to-noise — actionable alerts vs total fired

iom_critical_sla_pct.description: Critical IOM findings remediated within 48h SLA

iom_high_sla_pct.description: High IOM findings remediated within 7d SLA
